message:
🌱 Add contour: document how to run multiple Contours per cluster (e.g. mission (#1323)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "contour-855-document-how-to-run-multiple-contours-per-cluster-e-g-internal-and-e",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: document how to run multiple Contours per cluster (e.g. internal and external)",
+    "description": "document how to run multiple Contours per cluster (e.g. internal and external). Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n contour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\n**Objective**\n\nI need to configure internal and external ingress controllers on AWS with NLB \n\nInternal Ingress is served by an internal NLB (only accessible from within the VPC)\nExternal Ingress is served by an external NLB (publicly"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for document how to run multiple Contours per cluster (e.g.…",
+        "description": "Move the example deployment to Kustomize. This requires the `kustomize`\ntool, since the version of Kustomize vendored in `kubectl apply -k`\nis too old to support.\n\nThe YAML documents in the example deployment are broken into 4 components\nlocated in `config/components` - types, contour, envoy and\n```yaml\n- serve\n        - --incluster\n        - --xds-address\n        - 0.0.0.0\n        - --xds-port\n        - $(CONTOUR_EXTERNAL_SERVICE_PORT)\n        - --envoy-http-port\n        - \"80\"   #<<<<<\n        - --envoy-https-port\n        - \"443\" #<<<<<\n        - --ingress-class-name=envoy-external\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade contour to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade contour:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade contour contour/contour --namespace contour\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour\nhelm list -n contour\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n contour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n contour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"document how to run multiple Contours per cluster (e.g.…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Move the example deployment to Kustomize. This requires the `kustomize`\ntool, since the version of Kustomize vendored in `kubectl apply -k`\nis too old to support.\n\nThe YAML documents in the example deployment are broken into 4 components\nlocated in `config/components` - types, contour, envoy and certgen.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- serve\n        - --incluster\n        - --xds-address\n        - 0.0.0.0\n        - --xds-port\n        - $(CONTOUR_EXTERNAL_SERVICE_PORT)\n        - --envoy-http-port\n        - \"80\"   #<<<<<\n        - --envoy-https-port\n        - \"443\" #<<<<<\n        - --ingress-class-name=envoy-external",
+        "- serve\n        - --incluster\n        - --xds-address\n        - 0.0.0.0\n        - --xds-port\n        - $(CONTOUR_INTERNAL_SERVICE_PORT)\n        - --envoy-http-port\n        - \"8080\" #<<<<<\n        - --envoy-https-port\n        - \"8443\" #<<<<<\n        - --ingress-class-name=envoy-internal",
+        "- name: NODE_NAME\n          valueFrom:\n            fieldRef:\n              fieldPath: spec.nodeName"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "contour",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "contour"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Daemonset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/issues/855",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/projectcontour/contour/pull/2474"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with contour installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
